Hey what's up dudes? Okay so I'm gonna coin this term because I haven't heard anyone else say it. We sell a vacation not the plane flight and now what I mean by that is that like I hear all the time people like yeah so benefits not features and all that stuff but like what they're really selling is like the benefits of the flight they're like you can have a first-class flight it's gonna be cushy it's gonna be comfortable you know you're gonna be in the TSA pre-check line so you're gonna skip the line go to the front like there's selling that rather than just talking about the freaking vacation right like and especially with with what we're doing this is a mental framework that I just want you to think about which is like you need to just be talking about the vacation nothing else the plane flight for us is the cookbook the meal plan the the the the meta-block workouts the puritization like you know that we have set up the three phases of like it doesn't matter like they don't care they do not care how they get there maybe your plane flight is nicer but like either way people pay a ton of money for a vacation but only X amount for a plane flight and a plane flight is still a cost okay and so I need that to resonate with you because people people sell the plane flight they sell the benefits of their plane flight versus another person's plane flight rather than just selling the vacation how amazing it's gonna be when they're there because that's what people buy I can't tell you the amount of time for like I've had someone go from the beginning of the beginning of the conversation the other conversation say yes I totally want to do this and then they sign up and then they're walking out the door and they're like wait how many days a week am I working out like when do I come back like that like they're like in a daze because like if you if you've done this right you should have people going through that experience because like the point is to put them in such an emotional state that they they truly like experience that they can taste what it's gonna be like when they're there how their husband's gonna look at them how they're gonna feel when they're going out with their friend how they feel when they look at their closet and realize that everything fits them the way they want it to like that's that's the stuff that we're talking about when you're you know like being a great example for your kids having your kids like my mom's so like hold on my mom's so healthy but like be like hey like having the energy to play with your kids and like being able to sit down on the couch after like a long day of playing with them and like cuddling with the kids because you like because they're healthy because they have the energy because they haven't like because they've lost weight all that kind of stuff that's what we're talking about like don't talk about the plane flight like do not talk about your training do not talk about the nutrition like just mention that they like yeah we're gonna be changed way to eat are you cool with that yes all you're getting is them to accept that they're gonna be willing to change that's it like all this stuff is details and it's truly irrelevant and it also gives them sticking points that they can then object to and say no to okay this is so huge like this is really important like when I understood this like my sales changed and like I was able to start getting people to buy things and be excited about things which like was crazy for me because no one was excited I had to like plead for people to give me money whereas by the end of selling the vacation they'll plead with you to give you money and to work with you it's a really crazy experience and when you when you start realizing when you're like I haven't even said anything about what we're gonna get you'll realize the power of what this means okay and I'm not immune to this all right like it's something that you have to work on because like we just care so much about what we've created for our prospects and our clients like we've put poured so much love into this program into this into the you know whatever the cookbook you made or the other nutrition plan and like it's so awesome it's so amazing it's gonna make it so easy for you all this stuff like plane flight doesn't matter you need to make it amazing so that when they get it they they're like oh this is easy this is great and it means they're more likely to succeed but in terms of the sale you don't talk about it that's only once they've given you money then you're gonna explain how this whole system works and blah blah when they're inclined when they need to know that but when they're making the decision on whether to work with you or not you talk about the plane flight sorry but the vacation not the plane flight because plane flight sounds like long-line security gotta check my bags if they lose them like you know what if we have turbulence in the air food sucks on the plane like what if the person next to me is a baby or it was coughing like there's just all these things that can come up even if that's the what they need they need a plane flight to get them to the vacation they're still gonna be thinking about that I can't show up to the workouts what if I get really sore what if I hurt myself what if I don't like the food what if I can't stick with it what if I go out with friends like if you're not talking about that they're gonna have all these doubts that they already know where all these past experiences they're gonna reinforce them saying no we're saying yeah maybe I'll think about it when you talk about any of that stuff and you only talk about where they're gonna be in 12 weeks or 16 weeks or six weeks whatever it is right that's that's where the magic happens and it's honestly unbelievable so I want to challenge you that when you're selling try try it like try this a couple times don't say anything about the program nothing like trying to like challenge yourself and say as little as possible and watch them by all right so anyways hope this is valuable for you and look forward to seeing you soon
